rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for interface behavior and implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings.
Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL scopes matching component type or implementation.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE code are visible in the target AADL scope.
Preserve AADL architecture structure during AGREE annex insertion.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings use assign statements for output features or auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables.
